category_sources: source_facts.description says msdl is a downloader for various streaming protocols; official project site describes it as a multi-protocol downloader for mms, mmsh, wms-rtsp, real-rtsp, ftp, and http.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is msdl; official project site title and SourceForge project heading use msdl.
docs_sources: Official project site links an Online Manual; the manual page is the dedicated official documentation surface, with homepage as project overview.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty. Official SourceForge project and homepage expose releases and documentation, but no official VCS/code repository URL was found, so repo remains null.
tags_sources: Official homepage and manual list supported protocols including mms, mmsh, real-rtsp, wms-rtsp, ftp, and http.
